mentions.note: Stock troubled due to Chinese manufacturing confusion; hold for now as weakness doesn't seem to reflect reality. If tariff overturn from Supreme Court, could pop $25+.
Caller Norma (81-year owner): erratic recently but Cramer has faith it can go higher; hold, don't switch to Corning Weave.
Caller Arthur asked about holding; Cramer worried about China manufacturing exposure, inexplicable decline, and large short position creating outlook confusion.
Cosmetics group deeply troubled; individual company strength can't overcome sector weakness. Can't buck a bad milieu.
